privileged_info_summary: The task is a generative and synthetic exercise requiring the creation of an ActivInspire diagram from scratch. It has been verified that the expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/rainfall_graph.flipchart', the requested bar heights strictly follow the trend (Mar > Apr > Jan > Feb), and the target color is blue, which all exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and verifier.py logic.
